description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image with a before_script that runs ruby -v and bundle install. Define two stages: test and publish. In the test stage add an rspec job that executes bundle exec rspec -f d. In the publish stage add a push-cookbook job that runs git clone https://$OPS_CLONE_USERNAME:$OPS_CLONE_PASSWORD@ops.gitlab.net/gitlab-cookbooks/cookbook-publisher.git /tmp/cookbook-publisher, copies /tmp/cookbook-publisher/publisher.rb to the project root, and runs ruby publisher.rb, and configure it to run only on the master branch and only when the $OPS_CLONE_USERNAME and $OPS_CLONE_PASSWORD variables are present. No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
